title: Are LLM agents finally reliable enough for production?
snippet: After 2 years of unreliable agent demos, something has shifted. Claude 3.5 and GPT-4o are reliable enough for narrow agent tasks in production. The trend is accelerating.
author: hn_user_julia

title: Agentic coding assistants are eating developer productivity tools
snippet: Cursor, Devin, and GitHub Copilot Workspace are agentic coding tools. The trend from autocomplete to full autonomous coding agents is clear and irreversible.
author: hn_user_kevin
